title: Lower Freeze Overlay
description: With this pack, the snow freezing overlay doesn't take up the entire screen, allowing you to have a better vision.
body:
# ❄️ Lower Freeze Overlay ❄️

**Lower Freeze Overlay** reduces the freezing effect on your screen in Minecraft.  
Instead of covering the entire view.

## Features
- **Improved visibility**: See your surroundings even while freezing.  
- **Immersion preserved**: The icy effect remains, but less intrusive.  

## Perfect for
- Exploring snowy biomes.  
- Who want a cleaner interface without losing the cold vibe.
